related_posts.content:
‼️A reminder that the Sopoints for the activities of wk 14 on SoDex will be distributed tomorrow ( Tuesday, 12:00 UTC).

✍️Every week SoDex a decentralized exchange managed by @SoSoValueCrypto distributes SoPoints from a 1M points pool to users who have contributed in one way or the other during the course of the week.

Such contribution includes but not limited to the following:

- Trading 
- Staking
- Vault participation 

🎁 Earlier this year, @SoSoValueCrypto announced a 150M $SOSO (currently valued at $60M) to incentivize users that will be part of a 24 week campaign.🪂

🔥Important stats :

Current week : 15

Total number of users: 189k approx.

Yet to be part of SoDex Airdrop?

hot_topics.summary: The new SoDEX trading experience is live.

related_posts.content:
🧵1/The new SoDEX trading experience is live.
  
You spoke, we built. The new SoDEX is no longer just our vision—it’s a reflection of YOUR feedback. Over the past 3 months, every bug report and UI suggestion you sent has been baked into this upgrade.
  
What’s evolved?  
✅ Instant Gratification: Zero-lag order execution & position updates.  
✅ Ultra-Light: Optimized front-end that won't cook your RAM.  
✅ Visual Harmony: Reimagined Light/Dark modes for marathon sessions.  
✅ Absolute Clarity: Integrated CLOBSCAN for 100% on-chain transparency.
  
This isn't a final version; it's a living protocol. Try the new Spot & Perps flow, and let’s keep breaking things together.
  
🎁 Bug Hunter Program is LIVE: Found a glitch? Get rewarded for your sharp eyes.
  
More details below 👇🧵

official_announcements.content:
SoDEX open interest reached a new all-time high of $12.05M.

Every upgrade, every trade, and every piece of feedback from the community is helping push SoDEX into its next phase.

Keep building.

$CRCL earnings are out.

Circle reported Q1 total revenue and reserve income of $694M, up 20% YoY, but below market expectations of around $721M.
After the report, $CRCL once jumped over 8%, before narrowing gains to around 3%.

The numbers are out.
The market reaction is still moving.

What’s your take on $CRCL after earnings — LONG or SHORT, and why?

Make your call, trade it on SoDEX, and share your official SoDEX Position Share Card for a chance to share 200 $SOSO.

How to join:
✅ Trade $CRCL Perp on SoDEX
✅ Single order size must be > 1,000 USDC
✅ RT this post
✅ Comment with your official SoDEX Position Share Card + ORDER ID

Only official SoDEX Position Share Card screenshots will be counted.

Lucky Draw: 10 winners × 20 $SOSO each 
Bonus: Winners who quote this post with their CRCL view + official SoDEX Position Share Card and reach 1,000+ views will receive an extra 10 SOSO.

Campaign Period: May 10, 2026, 23:00 UTC – May 15, 2026, 23:00 UTC

Trade the earnings move.Share your order. Let the market speak. 

Trade now:

How does the new SoDEX Light / Dark mode feel compared with the previous version?

Do you prefer the new one, or was the old version better in some areas?

Tell us what feels better, what feels worse, and what you think we should improve next.

Keep Building.
